name: Chocolate-Bourbon Bites
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, beat butter and sugar with an electric mixer on medium speed until fluffy.
2. Add bourbon; beat well.
3. Gradually add flour and cocoa powder, beating until well mixed.
4. Stir in chocolate pieces.
5. Chill the dough for 2 hours or until firm enough to handle.
6. Shape the dough into 1-inch balls.
7. Roll each ball in egg white, then in nuts.
8. Place on a lightly greased baking sheet.
9. Bake at 350°F for about 12 minutes, or until edges are firm (the center will remain soft).
10. Cool on the baking sheet for 1 minute.
11. Transfer to wire racks to finish cooling.
Makes about 30 pieces.
